title: lamiophlomis rotata subsp. bhutanica
intro: Lamiophlomis rotata subsp. bhutanica is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Lamiophlomis rotata plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lamiophlomis rotata subsp. bhutanica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by infusing its leaves in hot water to make a tea, which is believed to provide relief from various ailments.
